name: social-media-mcp
description: Generic MCP server for creating, publishing, scheduling, and analyzing social media posts across brands. Blotato is the first provider; the publishing layer is abstracted so other providers (Buffer, Metricool, Hootsuite, Meta) can be added without changing the MCP tool surface. Ships with both a stdio entrypoint (Claude Desktop/Cursor) and a Streamable HTTP entrypoint (ChatGPT and other remote MCP clients).
